workflow.name: Set Up a Combat Arena Level
workflow.description: Create a new level with floor, walls, lighting, player start, and navigation mesh for AI — ready for combat gameplay testing.
intentPatterns: set up a test level for fighting

steps.purpose: Spawn a large floor plane (StaticMeshActor with floor mesh)
Spawn wall actors around the perimeter
Add a PlayerStart actor for spawn point
Add directional light for basic illumination
Add a SkyLight for ambient lighting
Add and configure NavMeshBoundsVolume for AI pathfinding
Set the GameMode to your combat game mode

workflow.expectedOutcome: A ready-to-play arena level with floor, walls, lighting, player spawn, and AI navigation mesh
